site.title: Cesar | Portfolio
site.description: Websites, apps, and games — selected work and experiments by Cesar.
site.author: Cesar

websites.sectionIntro: Apps and sites you’re building — placeholder art lives in public/work/*.svg; swap paths for real screenshots when you have them. Tech stacks below are starter labels: edit content/portfolio.json to match each repo.

items.title: Cesars Portfolio (this site)
items.summary: This repo: JSON-driven content, case-study cards, games grid, contact, SEO routes — tuned for dark UI and fast deploys on Vercel.
items.imageAlt: Placeholder icon — browser window with check mark

items.title: NWI Fun Ball Calm
items.summary: Site and story for NWI Fun Ball Calm — clear hero, sections, and CTAs tuned for sharing and repeat visits. Add your live domain in links when it’s public.
items.imageAlt: Placeholder icon — browser window with focus mark

items.title: MZ Linda's East Door
items.summary: MZ Linda's East Door — voice- or chat-led flows with obvious states and room to plug in AI, scripts, or live data when you connect the backend.
items.imageAlt: Placeholder icon — L mark and chat bubble

items.title: 3D Player
items.summary: Embeddable 3D viewer for the web — the page or component that loads and plays 3D models (camera controls, loading UI, glTF/Three.js or React Three Fiber). “Shell” just means the outer app frame around the 3D canvas, not a terminal.

quote.text: We are the music makers, and we are the dreamers of dreams

items.title: Tarot stream — chat-controlled
items.summary: Live tarot readings where stream chat drives the experience — votes, prompts, or commands that flip draws, build the spread, and stay legible on camera with a clean overlay-friendly layout.
items.iconAlt: Placeholder icon — stream and ritual vibe (update art when you have a tarot thumbnail)

items.title: Chatling Ranch
items.summary: Ranch-themed chat and progression — think cozy multiplayer energy with lightweight real-time messaging and playful state.
items.iconAlt: Placeholder icon — barn and chat bubble

items.title: Dungeon Master Lite
items.summary: Tabletop helper for DMs — chat-forward UX, dice-friendly flows, and a path to ship on TikTok or the open web.
items.iconAlt: Dungeon Master Lite — placeholder d20 icon

items.title: More soon
items.summary: Reserve this slot for the next ship — add iconSrc and copy when the project is ready.

contact.headline: Let’s build something
contact.body: Open to freelance and full-time roles that need strong UI, performance, and clear communication. Replace the placeholder email with yours before you ship.

footer.note: Content lives in content/portfolio.json — edit there and push to redeploy (see docs/CONTENT_WORKFLOW.md).
